parameters.jsonBody: {"query": "SELECT campaign.name, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.clicks, metrics.conversions, metrics.cost_per_conversion FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_7_DAYS AND campaign.status = 'ENABLED'"}
